text.value:
DELETE t
FROM dbo.CurrentCurriculumHistory t
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON t.childprofileid = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
**/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.DPHReports t
JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.memberId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.DataPhase t
JOIN dbo.ChildProfileLessonTarget cpl ON cpl.id = t.targetId
JOIN dbo.IepObjective ij ON cpl.iepobjectiveid = ij.id
JOIN dbo.Iepgoal ig ON ij.Iepgoalid = ig.id
JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON ig.childprofileid = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );

INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountInfoId = a.ID

        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2

            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.ExportSubscription t
JOIN dbo.ScheduledReports r ON r.exportSubscriptionId = t.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON r.AccountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (

DELETE t
FROM dbo.ExternalMembers t
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.memberId
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON t.memberId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON 
    (tm.accountInfoID = a.ID OR cp.accountInfoId = a.ID)
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
**/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.FileCabinet t
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON t.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember m ON t.MemberId = m.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON 
    t.accountInfoId = a.ID OR cp.accountInfoId = a.ID OR m.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/***WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
***/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.FileCabinetEmailView t
INNER JOIN dbo.FileCabinetFiles cf ON t.FileCabinetFileId = cf.id
INNER JOIN dbo.FileCabinet fc ON cf.Filecabinetid = fc.id
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON fc.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember m ON fc.MemberId = m.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountFileTagToFile afttf ON afttf.FileId = cf.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountFileTag aft ON aft.Id = afttf.AccountFileTagId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON 
    a.ID = fc.accountInfoId OR a.ID = cp.accountInfoId OR a.ID = m.accountInfoId OR a.ID = aft.AccountId
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
***/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.FileCabinetFiles t
JOIN dbo.FileCabinet fc ON t.Filecabinetid = fc.id
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON fc.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember m ON fc.MemberId = m.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountFileTagToFile afttf ON afttf.FileId = t.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountFileTag aft ON aft.Id = afttf.AccountFileTagId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON 
    a.ID = fc.accountInfoId OR a.ID = cp.accountInfoId OR a.ID = m.accountInfoId OR a.ID = aft.AccountId
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
***/

FROM dbo.FileCabinetFolders t

INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON fc.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember m ON fc.MemberId = m.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON 
    a.ID = fc.accountInfoId OR a.ID = cp.accountInfoId OR a.ID = m.accountInfoId
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE
